selected_dialects.reason: Variable cross-section duct requires loft_op across three sections (circle→rectangle→circle) along Z-axis with explicit z-coordinate profiles.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Three loft sections at z=0 (circle r50), z=150 (rectangle 120x80), z=300 (circle r40) define the variable duct geometry.

safety_notes: No manufacturing or certification claims made. Output is reference geometry only.
